items.title: Magic from Álvarez, not Messi, sees Argentina thro...
items.summary: It wasn't Lionel Messi coming up with the goods, but Argentina's supporting cast stepped up after the Switzerland defense muted their captain.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Neymar The Gambler? Brazil Star Enters World Series Of Poker After World Cup Exit
items.summary: Neymar competed in the 2026 World Series of Poker, which comes one week after Brazil's round-of-16 exit at the 2026 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
